contributions: Maintenance of Windows Server services (Active Directory, RDS, File Server)
Maintenance of backup solutions using Veeam
Support for remote access environments (Citrix, RDS, VDI, ACS-Cloud)
Full management of internal IT infrastructure
Administration of Windows Server environment and Domain Controller

Ensuring data integrity, security, and transfer reliability in international environments

projects.title: Personal Homelab Infrastructure
projects.architecture: Proxmox-based virtualization environment with Debian hosts, running a Kubernetes cluster via k3s, with secure VPN networking for remote access.
projects.challenge: Building a resilient home lab environment for testing and learning enterprise-grade technologies while maintaining low power consumption and high availability.
projects.solution: Implemented Proxmox for virtualization with ZFS storage, deployed k3s for Kubernetes learning, configured WireGuard for secure remote access, and automated backups with Veeam.

projects.title: Personal Website Infrastructure
projects.architecture: Static website built with Hugo, automatically deployed via GitHub Actions to Cloudflare Pages with Git-based content management.
projects.challenge: Creating a fast, secure personal website with easy content updates and zero infrastructure maintenance.
projects.solution: Used Hugo for static site generation with Git-based workflow. GitHub Actions automatically build and deploy on push to main branch, while Cloudflare Pages provides global CDN and HTTPS.

projects.title: Experimental Projects
projects.architecture: AI-assisted development projects exploring automation workflows and modern tooling patterns.
projects.challenge: Rapidly prototyping and testing new development workflows and automation patterns.
projects.solution: Created experimental projects using AI-assisted development tools to explore automation possibilities and improve development efficiency.
